# kSecGuestAttributePid

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is an integer of type `pid_t` representing a process ID (PID), usually of the kernel’s guest.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecGuestAttributePid: CFString
```
title: kSecGuestAttributePid
